tasks.label: Verify kitchen-sink handoff regression grep
tasks.command: pnpm playwright test --project kitchen-sink-e2e --grep "React router to browser-router|React route handoff stable"

tasks.label: Log kitchen-sink handoff regression run
tasks.command: mkdir -p .tmp && pnpm playwright test --project kitchen-sink-e2e --grep "React router to browser-router|React route handoff stable" > .tmp/kitchen-sink-handoff-playwright.log 2>&1
